calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Wells Fargos Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon
Off Calendar Sep-27-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Seth Weisburst of Winston & Strawn Law Firm (415-591-1029) appears as counsel for petitioner, Wells Fargo Advisors LLC

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PETITIONER WELLS FARGO ADVISORS, LLC'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Written order and judgment are signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not reported. (D302)
